text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the autumn Tenno Sho soon<n>approaching, an
unexpected visitor<n>comes looking for
Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, but... is Fukukitaru here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka?! Is it really you?! What are<n>you doing
here?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's been ages, or maybe it hasn't...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's one of those... or maybe in<n>between. Um, do
you have a minute?<n>I'd like to talk with you and
your<n>trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! It really feels like autumn<n>outside. The
taste of steamy, roasted<n>sweet potatoes and
chestnuts makes<n>this season such a happy time!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Happy, huh? Hey, Fukukitaru... Are<n>you happy
now?
Huh? Why do you ask?

I was wondering if things have<n>changed for you.
At one point, you<n>seemed pretty lost.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right... I'm so sorry about what<n>happened back
at the Kinko Sho. I've<n>been wanting to apologize to
you<n>again...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But if I had to say one way or the<n>other, I think I
really am happy these<n>days. Probably!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have so many precious people in my<n>life now,
like my trainer and my fans!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm having so much fun giving my<n>best in my
races—experiencing the<n>ups and downs of running
with<n>everyone.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But even more than that, I found the<n>way to
become happy on a
super-ultra-mega-great-blessing<n>level!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The secret is... not dying!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if you want to keep spending<n>time with the
people important to you,<n>you've got to live as long
as you can,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A hundred years is better than fifty!<n>Two hundred
is even better! Just<n>think about all that extra time!
Long<n>live long life!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Long life... I'm so happy to hear that<n>you found
what makes you happy,<n>Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What about you, Suzuka? Are you<n>happy?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess I'm okay. But there is<n>still
something holding me back...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I haven't reached it yet—the other<n>side of speed.

Right, you told me about that before.<n>Do you think
you'll get there?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting close, I think. I get the<n>feeling that's
where my happiness<n>lies.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It may only last for a moment, but I'm<n>going to find
a way to be just as<n>happy as you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I have to get going now. I still<n>haven't finished
all the race entry<n>paperwork.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Okay! See you later, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm? Yes?
choice_data_list:
I know you have it in you. Be patient with
yourself—you'll get there.

I know you have it in you. Be patient with
yourself—you'll get there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I'm doing very<n>well right
now, so I think I'll be just<n>fine.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They both see happiness in<n>completely different
ways, and both<n>of them have found their own
paths.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru continues to<n>wave goodbye
long after Silence<n>Suzuka walks out of sight.
